title: The Jewel Ornament of Liberation
description: Gampopa's complete guide from ordinary being to Buddhahood — the Tibetan 'Summa Theologica' of the Buddhist path.
introduction: Gampopa's complete guide from ordinary being to Buddhahood — the Tibetan 'Summa Theologica' of the Buddhist path.

translation.text: All sentient beings possess buddha-nature. The cause of buddhahood is within every being. The condition is a spiritual friend. The method is the instructions of the spiritual friend. The result is the perfect body of a buddha.
